Research competitors and search results
Review your previous video analytics
Decide on topic and format of video
Choose primary keyword and variations
PLANNING AND PREPARATION
Keep going… consistency is the key!

VIDEO OPTIMIZATION CHECKLIST
Design eye-catching video thumbnail image
Upload and name video file with keyword
Create compelling title with keyword phrase
Write description: keywords, hashtags, links
Upload thumbnail and choose video settings
Add tags with keywords and related terms
Add end screen with videos and subscribe
Submit video to Rev to create subtitles
Add cards during video (only if relevant)
Set visibility to public and schedule to post
POSTING AND OPTIMIZATION
Send email and/or text to best friends/fans
Post on other social media (FB, Insta, etc)
Reply to all comments and give hearts
Comment on your commenters videos
If it performs run as Discovery ad (optional)
Start conversation in Community (optional)
Comment on influencers videos (optional)
PROMOTION AND ENGAGEMENT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
